nl_query: For each active evaluation attempt, show the script URN, student name, evaluator name, assignment type, attempt type, section name if split, current status, total marks, and the number of marks entries.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.urn, sc.name AS student_name, fc.name AS evaluator_name, sa.attempt_type AS script_assignment_type, ea.attempt_type AS evaluation_attempt_type, qs.name AS section_name, ea.status, ea.total_marks, COUNT(em.id) AS num_evaluation_marks
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = ea.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   script_page sp ON sp.script_id = a.id
JOIN   question_section qs ON qs.id = sp.question_section_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = qs.course_id AND au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.student_id = a.student_id
WHERE  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY a.urn, sc.name, fc.name, sa.attempt_type, ea.attempt_type, qs.name, ea.status, ea.total_marks
ORDER BY ea.attempt_type, a.urn;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (answer_script, script_assignment, question_section, evaluation_attempt, script_page, academic_unit). You must qualify it with a table alias.
